stemHtml:
Regulation 376/2014 on the reporting, analysis and follow-up of occurrences in civil aviation and Regulation 996/2010 on the investigation and prevention of accidents and incidents both deal with incident reports.

Regulation 376/2014 intends to...

options.a: help judicial authorities in managing aviation safety risks, Regulation 996/2010 aims to prevent accidents by prosecuting.
options.b: prevent accidents by investigating, Regulation 996/2010 aims to assist Member states, the Agency and organisations in managing aviation safety risk.
options.c: assist Member states, the Agency and organisations in managing aviation safety risk, Regulation 996/2010 prevent accidents by investigating.
options.d: prevent accidents by prosecuting, Regulation 996/2010 help judicial authorities in managing aviation safety risks.
